_comment: Template. Copy to config.json on EACH machine and set its values. config.json is gitignored because the laptop and the box need different settings. Env vars (EQ_BRIDGE_DIR, EQ_EXEC_HOST, EQ_EXEC_PORT) still override.
_box_setup: On the 32 GB box (runs the executor + bridge): bridgeDir must match BRIDGE_DIR in mqbridge/bridge.lua; executor.host = 0.0.0.0 so the LAN can reach it.
_laptop_setup: On the laptop (runs the brain): brain.executorHost = the BOX's LAN IP (e.g. 192.168.1.204). bridgeDir is unused here.
_relay_comment: Executor->client relay. {peer}=target name, {cmd}=command to run locally on it. e3next targeted broadcast runs the command locally (so #/^ server commands get parsed); DanNet /dex does not. Adjust if your e3 command differs.
